title: Biomes, Bosses and Beings
description: My Favorite Forge mods including Biomes o' plenty, L ender's cataclysm and Natralist to name a few.
body:
****Github is set up. If you have suggestions, please submit.****

A forge modpack I have been putting together for over a year. It is full of everything from Biomes to Bosses to Beings. If you wish to use this for content the go ahead but just don't steal or claim that the modpack is yours.
If you wish to see all the mods included then click on the version you want to look at and then scoll down.

**I would Recommend about 3 GB of ram to run this. Along with another 1 GB when spawning the wither storm.**

**Most Notable Mods**
- Biomes o' plenty
- Create
- Cracker's wither storm mod
- Tectonic
- Nullscape
- Natralist
- Incendium
- Ad Astra
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- The Ather
- Yung's Better everything(All of Yung's Better structure mods)
- End Remastered
- Merge and Toggle Enchantments mods
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Farmers Delight
